mainEntity.name: What should I do first in Stardew Valley Year 1 Spring?

acceptedAnswer.text: Day 1: clear 15 parsnip starter seeds, fish until 1:50am. Day 2: plant more parsnips from purchased seeds. Days 3-12: fish daily for income, mine on rainy days. Day 13: buy Strawberries at Egg Festival (as many as possible). Rest of Spring: fish, mine, build relationships.

mainEntity.name: How much money can I make in Spring Year 1?

acceptedAnswer.text: With optimal play: 40,000-50,000g by end of Spring. Strategy: fishing in mountain lake (best income), strawberry farming (80+ plants), and investing in backpack upgrades.
